consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB, Box 150, 43523, Mölnlycke, Sweden'. Invoice header lists 'Emerson Automation Solutions / Rosemount Tank Radar AB / Box 150 / 435 33 MÖLNLYCKE / SWEDEN'. The name 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB' is found explicitly in the invoice header, Ship From block, and footer. Country Sweden is confirmed via explicit address 'SWEDEN' and VAT prefix SE in SE556043512401. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH before needing to proceed to 4.1.3 sequential checks. The postnumber differs slightly (43523 vs 435 33) which is formatting only and does not affect MATCH per 4.1.5.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Rosemount Tank Radar AB' is explicitly identified in the invoice header, Ship From block, and footer. Country Sweden is confirmed by explicit address and VAT prefix SE. MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '2 EA'. This is the primary verifiable quantity per 4.4.2.1.
Invoice Qty Shipped: '2 EA'. Certificate Box 7: '2 EA'. Exact match – numeric value 2, unit EA.
Certificate GW: 11.30 KG. Invoice GW: 11.30 KG. Match. Certificate NW: 4.60 KG. Invoice NW: 4.60 KG. Match. No contradictions.
comparison_steps.result: All additional quantities confirmed – no contradiction.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity '2 EA' used as primary verification quantity.
Förekomstkontroll: numeric value 2 with unit EA found exactly in invoice.
Additional quantities (GW 11.30 KG, NW 4.60 KG) also verified – no contradictions.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '2 EA'. Invoice Qty Shipped: '2 EA'. Exact match on primary quantity. Additionally, certificate Box 6 lists GW:11.30 KG and NW:4.60 KG. Invoice Packing Summary: Gross WT 11.30 KG, Net WT 4.60 KG. All values match exactly. Packages: certificate '2 Ctn', invoice '2 Ctn'. All quantities verified. No contradictions. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Primary quantity '2 EA' from Box 7 matches invoice exactly. Gross weight (11.30 KG) and net weight (4.60 KG) also match. No contradictions found. MATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.1.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: SWEDEN (Country of Origin per unit, both units)

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of Origin' column. Both units list 'SWEDEN'.

Certificate origin: 'European Community, Sweden'. Invoice origin: 'SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per 4.5.4.2: cert='European Community' and invoice='Sweden' (EU member) → verified. Additionally cert specifically names 'Sweden' and invoice confirms 'SWEDEN' → verified.
Certificate states 'European Community' + 'Sweden'. Invoice explicitly confirms 'SWEDEN' as country of origin. No additional non-EU origins in invoice. Full confirmation.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization: Sweden is EU member, cert says 'European Community, Sweden', invoice says 'SWEDEN'.
Certificate 'EU Sweden' confirmed by invoice 'SWEDEN' – single EU member state, full confirmation.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'European Community, Sweden'. Invoice Country of Origin column: 'SWEDEN' for both units. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2, 'European Community' in cert and specific EU member 'Sweden' in invoice are mutually verifiable. Additionally, cert names 'Sweden' specifically and invoice confirms 'SWEDEN'. Per 4.5.4.2.1, cert='EU Sweden' is fully confirmed when invoice explicitly states 'SWEDEN'. No non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'European Community, Sweden' is verified by invoice's explicit 'Country of Origin: SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state, confirming the European Community designation. MATCH per 4.5.4.2 and 4.5.4.2.1.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Rosemount Tank Radar AB, mottagaren EMERSON FZE i Dubai, varubeskrivningen Radar Level Transmitter, kvantiteten 2 EA samt ursprungslandet Sverige/European Community verifieras samtliga mot fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Rosemount Tank Radar AB identified in invoice header and Ship From. Consignee EMERSON FZE matches Sold To/Invoice To exactly. Goods description 'Radar Level Transmitter' matches with verified invoice reference. Quantity 2 EA matches exactly, with GW and NW also confirmed. Origin 'European Community, Sweden' verified against invoice 'SWEDEN' via EU member state normalization.
